description: Encodes every critique ledger failure mode with detection boundary, fail-closed action, allowed WBC PersistenceStatus values, forbidden writes, recovery evidence, and admission consequence.

failure_modes.description: Critique producer start event fails to persist to the attempt ledger.
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Abort the critique attempt — no occurrence is created. Record failure in attempt ledger as FAILED.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Attempt ledger start-failure receipt with PersistenceStatus.PERSISTENCE_FAILED
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — no critique occurrence admissible. Attempt must be retried.

failure_modes.description: Critique producer start event persistence status is INDETERMINATE — cannot confirm whether the attempt was recorded.
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Treat as failure: no occurrence is created. Record INDETERMINATE status with reopen condition for manual resolution.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Attempt ledger INDETERMINATE receipt + manual authority review
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — INDETERMINATE persistence fails the test rather than being treated as clean success.

failure_modes.description: Critique producer output cannot be parsed as a valid finding.
failure_modes.detection_boundary: ParseStatus.FAILED in critique producer output parsing
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Record failed attempt with ParseStatus.FAILED, no findings emitted. Attempt completes with empty finding set.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Attempt ledger completion receipt with ParseStatus.FAILED
failure_modes.admission_consequence: FAILED attempt — no findings admitted. Does not block other attempts.

failure_modes.description: Critique producer custody fails — attempt is dropped before output.
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Record dropped attempt with ParseStatus.DROPPED. Attempt is a custody failure, not a finding failure.
failure_modes.admission_consequence: DROPPED — custody failure. Does not produce findings.

failure_modes.description: Critique producer output is parseable but structurally malformed — preserved as unavailable/unknown evidence.
failure_modes.detection_boundary: ParseStatus.MALFORMED in critique producer output parsing
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Record malformed output with ParseStatus.MALFORMED. Preserve as unavailable evidence with explicit limitation.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Malformed output preserved with EvidenceAvailability.UNAVAILABLE and reopen condition
failure_modes.admission_consequence: MALFORMED — evidence preserved but findings not admitted pending manual review.

failure_modes.description: Not all parseable occurrences have a matching FindingReconciliationEvent.
failure_modes.detection_boundary: Semantic loop reconciliation pass — occurrence_count != reconciliation_count
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Reject the revision manifest. Do not produce briefings or projections. Raise typed validation failure.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Unreconciled occurrence list with occurrence_ids missing reconciliation
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — incomplete reconciliation coverage prevents manifest construction.

failure_modes.description: Not all reconciled findings have a matching FindingDispositionEvent.
failure_modes.detection_boundary: Semantic loop disposition pass — finding_count != disposition_count
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Reject the revision manifest. Do not produce briefings. Raise typed validation failure.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Undisposed finding list with canonical_finding_ids missing disposition
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — incomplete disposition coverage prevents manifest construction.

failure_modes.description: Briefing budget exceeded but no spillover envelope linked — findings silently truncated.
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Reject the briefing. Raise DomainBriefingBudgetError with overflow findings linked.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Overflow finding list with linked spillover DomainBriefingEnvelope reference
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — silent truncation is forbidden. Must produce linked spillover envelope.

failure_modes.description: Briefing or projection references evidence whose content hash no longer matches the current manifest.
failure_modes.detection_boundary: Content hash recomputation — stored hash != fresh hash
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Flag as stale. Do not admit stale evidence. Require regeneration from source.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Stale hash report with stored vs recomputed hash pairs
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — stale evidence references are rejected.

failure_modes.description: Evidence artifact declares an unsupported or future schema version.
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Reject with typed SchemaVersionError. Do not attempt compatibility-preserve mode for unknown versions.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Schema version mismatch report with expected vs actual version
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — unsupported schema versions are rejected. Corrupt or future-version inputs fail validation.

failure_modes.description: Two events share the same identity (occurrence_id, reconciliation_id, or disposition_id).
failure_modes.detection_boundary: Identity uniqueness check during append-only event construction
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Reject the duplicate. Preserve the first-occurring event. Log duplicate detection.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Duplicate detection log with event identity and first-occurrence timestamp
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — duplicate events are not idempotent append; second event is rejected.

failure_modes.description: Event producer is not in the source_to_owner_matrix for the claimed domain.
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: Reject the event. Log unauthorized producer attempt.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Ownership validation failure report with producer identity and claimed domain
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — events from unauthorized producers are rejected.

failure_modes.description: Final manifest persistence fails — all event processing was successful but the durable write fails.
failure_modes.detection_boundary: LedgerRevisionManifest persistence returns PersistenceStatus.PERSISTENCE_FAILED or INDETERMINATE
failure_modes.fail_closed_action: FAIL the entire revision. Do not admit as clean success. Record terminal persistence failure with retry predicate.
failure_modes.recovery_evidence: Terminal persistence failure receipt with retry predicate
failure_modes.admission_consequence: BLOCKED — terminal persistence failure is not clean success. INDETERMINATE fails the test.

cross_reference.fail_closed_principle: Every failure mode has a detection boundary, a fail-closed action, and forbidden writes. No failure mode is silently accepted — INDETERMINATE persistence always fails the test rather than being treated as clean success.
